compliance_note: ships only when the EOI phase is active; re-clear against live conditions. Non-binding expression of interest only. No payment, no commitment, no allocation, no priority, no minimum. Verbatim CSF warning retained. Re-run the full compliance battery against live offer conditions before this phase goes live.
angle: Raise-specific (EOI: this is a real CSF raise, indicate non-binding interest)
hook_type: Cadence numbers + 'Birchal Next is what comes next' recursion-to-offer (interest-only frame)
tactic: Proof cadence -> name the raise -> non-binding interest ask
primary_text:
After 324 raises and $234M+, Birchal Next is what comes next.

For eight years our platform helped Australians own a piece of companies like Naked Life and Medigrowth. 137,000 of them did. Now we are opening our own Crowd-Sourced Funding raise to fund the next chapter.

If that interests you, lodge a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment, and you decide nothing until you read the offer document.

Indicate your interest. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: A real CSF raise. Tell us you're interested.
description: Non-binding. No payment, no commitment. Indicate your interest.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- E3 Raise-specific (EOI, first-timers, phase-gated)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W8 raise-clarity angle, re-framed for the EOI phase regime.
_v5_rationale: Directly answers the client's core feedback in the EOI phase: names it 'our own Crowd-Sourced Funding raise', 'a real CSF raise', unmistakably an offer, not brand content, while staying interest-only and non-binding.
Hook Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode (cadence + 'Birchal Next is what comes next' recursion gap).
BIRCHAL-NEXT used forward-looking only ('what comes next', 'the next chapter'); no present-state capability claim; no 'backed by X and Y'.
EOI language: 'lodge a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment'. No allocation/priority/minimum/preferential.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors, EOI phase.
_a_pile_signals: recursion gap (Birchal Next is what comes next)
_compliance_findings_resolved: EOI regime: 'lodge a non-binding expression of interest', 'no payment, no commitment', 'indicate your interest'. Allowed EOI language only.

STILL HARD-BLOCK clear: no 'first in line', no priority access/allocation, no 'secure/reserve your allocation/place/spot in the raise', no 'shares allocated to early registrants', no minimum, no 'same terms as institutional/insiders', no 'be first in the queue'. Zero matches.
BANNED-CSF-PHRASES (waitlist set): zero matches. No 'invest/buy/subscribe now'.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
BRAND-EXCLUDED: only verified-good raises (Naked Life RAISE-001, Medigrowth RAISE-003).
BIRCHAL-NEXT forward-looking only; no 'backed by X and Y'; banned AI-tells from the verbatim positioning not used in ad prose.
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears once ('Birchal Next'); first-person we/our elsewhere.
